description: Deck your holiday emails with our festive, animated, two-column template that brilliantly captures the spirit of Christmas. It's perfect for advertising your Food & Beverage sale this season, boasting a vibrant mix of red and white hues that instantly draw attention to your special discounts. The template features light and bright designs, adorned with beautiful Christmas ornaments that will surely captivate your customers. This is the ideal solution for businesses looking to spread holiday cheer while promoting their seasonal sales. So, give your Christmas promotions a makeover and make your products the star of the holiday feast with our eye-catching email template.
short_description: Promote your Food & Beverage holiday sale with our vibrant, animated email template. Adorned with Christmas ornaments in a mix of red and white, it's perfect for highlighting seasonal discounts. Boost your Christmas promotions and spread holiday cheer with our captivating design.

designer.description: A team of passionate designers, marketers, and technologists with an understanding that great design inspires action. At Beefree, we’re committed to creating responsive, mobile-friendly, and high-converting templates that empower teams to get more done with less time.
